# CWE-1067 negative: prefix search on indexed column (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-1067-safe.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

// CWE-1067 mitigated: prefix match on indexed slug column avoids sequential scan.

import (
	"database/sql"
	"net/http"
)

func SearchArticlesPure(db *sql.DB) http.HandlerFunc {
	return func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
		prefix := r.URL.Query().Get("prefix")
		pattern := prefix + "%"
		rows, err := db.Query("SELECT id, slug FROM articles WHERE slug LIKE $1", pattern)
		if err != nil {
			http.Error(w, err.Error(), http.StatusInternalServerError)
			return
		}
		defer rows.Close()
		w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "application/json")
		w.Write([]byte(`{"results":[]}`))
	}
}
